data.title: Mark Cuban Says Brace For A 'Far Worse Than 2008' Financial Crisis If The New Tariffs Stick Around and DOGE Continues Cutting and Firing
Pacira Settles Patent Dispute Over Exparel With Fresenius, Delays Pain Med' Generics Entry Until 2030, Stock Jumps
data.description: Pacira settles Exparel patent cases, grants Fresenius phased license for generic sales beginning in 2030, with full access no earlier than 2039.

data.title: Intuitive Machines Taps SpaceX For 2027 Lunar Mission, Stock Gains
data.description: Intuitive Machines Inc. (NASDAQ: LUNR) is gaining ground after announcing its fourth lunar mission, IM-4, will launch aboard a SpaceX Falcon 9 rocket in 2027. The mission supports NASA's Near Space Network Services and aims to enhance Moon-based communications with new relay satellites.

data.title: Amazon And Google Backed Anthropic Plans Major EU Hiring Drive, Names New EMEA Chief
data.description: AI leader Anthropic has named Guillaume Princen Head of EMEA, driving its strategic growth in Europe. The company, supported by Amazon and Google, will hire over 100 roles across key offices in 2025.

data.title: Dow Plunges 1,178 Points After Trump's 'Liberation Day' Tariffs—JD Vance Says 'We Won't Fix Things Overnight'
